company_name: H2O So Clean Pool & Spa Services

hero.headline: San Diego's Most Trusted Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your backyard escape, not your weekend headache. H2O So Clean handles every detail so all you do is enjoy the water. Owner-operated, CPO-certified, and backed by a perfect 5-star rating.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool, Spa & Fountain Care<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to complex equipment repairs, Daniel and the H2O So Clean team handle it all so you never have to worry about your water features again.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter cleaning included every visit. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all year.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Service
cards.description: Water chemistry management, jet cleaning, filter care, and full sanitization. Your spa stays clean, safe, and always ready for a relaxing soak.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected or algae-filled pool? We restore it to sparkling condition with shock treatment, deep cleaning, and complete water rebalancing.

cards.title: Repairs & Diagnostics
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, plumbing leaks, and automation systems diagnosed and fixed fast. Parts carried on-truck for same-visit repairs.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of pumps, heaters, salt systems, automation controls, and energy-efficient upgrades. Done right the first time.

cards.title: Fountain Service
cards.description: Professional fountain cleaning, water treatment, pump maintenance, and aesthetic upkeep to keep your decorative water features running beautifully.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Schedule your complimentary $220-value visit. We perform a 13-factor water chemistry test and 45-point equipment inspection, then give you an honest assessment with zero pressure.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Daniel and the team arrive on schedule, every time. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and repairs are all covered. Parts stay on-truck so most fixes happen the same visit.

steps.title: Just Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Your pool, spa, or fountain stays in perfect condition week after week. If anything is ever off, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why San Diego Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated — Your Pool Gets Daniel's Personal Attention
about.description: Founded in 2018 by Daniel Schreiber, H2O So Clean was built on a simple idea: pool service should be honest, thorough, and fairly priced. As a Certified Pool Operator and licensed contractor, Daniel brings professional-grade expertise to every single job. Recognized as a Neighborhood Favorite in 2021 and holding a perfect 5-star rating, we treat every pool, spa, and fountain like it's our own.

features.title: Licensed & CPO-Certified
features.description: Daniel holds CPO Certification #623805 and California Contractor's License #1067459. Every job meets professional standards.

features.title: Open 7 Days, 7AM-7PM
features.description: Pool emergencies don't wait for Monday. We're available seven days a week to keep your water features running smoothly.

features.title: Perfect 5-Star Reputation
features.description: Every single review is five stars. We earn that rating by showing up on time, doing thorough work, and charging fair prices.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan starts with a free $220-value consultation. No contracts, no hidden fees — just honest service you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no additional cost. Daniel personally stands behind every job. That's the promise that earned us a perfect 5-star rating across every review platform.

faqs.question: What's included in the free $220 consultation?
faqs.answer: You get a full service visit, a 13-factor water chemistry test, a 45-point equipment inspection, and a system efficiency evaluation. We'll walk you through everything we find and give you an honest recommendation with zero pressure to commit.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll receive a detailed summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Do you only service pools?
faqs.answer: No — we service pools, spas, hot tubs, and decorative fountains. H2O So Clean is your one-stop shop for all residential and commercial water features throughout San Diego County.

faqs.question: How fast can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. For emergencies like a green pool or equipment failure, we offer rapid response. We're open 7 days a week, 7AM to 7PM, so just give us a call.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Daniel holds CPO Certification #623805 and California Contractor's License #1067459. We carry full liability insurance on every job for your complete peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Julie Miller
testimonials.text: Dan recently helped me with a pool heater connectivity issue and was so patient walking me through all the steps. He is super knowledgeable and professional. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Samuel M.
testimonials.text: Pool heater stopped working and filter was leaking. Called H2O which was the best thing I did. Daniel had the best prices and fastest service. Will definitely do business with them again.

testimonials.name: Jessie Bishop
testimonials.text: We've interacted with 4 different pool service companies with limited success. Daniel at H2O So Clean far exceeded our expectations and impressed us with his knowledge and customer service.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Book your free $220-value consultation today. No contracts, no pressure — just honest pool care from a team with a perfect 5-star track record.
